headline: Bitwise launches Canton ETP, tracking the native token of the blockchain platform built for capital markets
summary: Product aims to provide exchange-traded exposure to CC, the native token of the Canton Network blockchain platformCanton Network is a privacy-enabled blockchain that enables banks and financial institutions, allowing them to trade and settle assets digitally while keeping sensitive transaction details privateProduct is Bitwise’s latest institutional-grade ETP, reflecting growing investor interest in regulated digital asset infrastructure 26 May 2026, Frankfurt - Bitwise today announces the launc
